name: Nuix Limited
description: Nuix Limited is an Australian technology company that specializes in investigative analytics and intelligence software. Founded in 2000 and headquartered in Sydney, the company provides powerful solutions for extracting knowledge from vast quantities of unstructured data. Its software is widely used by organizations globally for complex eDiscovery, digital forensics, cybersecurity, and regulatory compliance, enabling teams to gain valuable insights and make informed decisions quickly. Nuix empowers legal, government, and corporate entities to efficiently manage data challenges and uncover critical information within their digital environments.
